intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is partially inaccurate. P1 (Yellow Pot) appears to be empty/fallow. P2/P4 (Black Pot) contains a single, struggling seedling. P3 (Black Pot) contains the white rabbit anchor and a single leaf specimen.

plant_audit.P1: No visible plant matter. Soil appears undisturbed.
plant_audit.P2/P4: Contains a single, thin, green stem/seedling. Appears to be in a state of arrested development.
plant_audit.P3: Contains a white rabbit figurine and one distinct, broad leaf. The leaf shows signs of chlorosis or thinning.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of crushed eggshells in P2/P4, likely an intentional soil amendment. A small electronic component (header pin) was present in early images and removed by T-1.

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-3: Stable. No significant growth or decay observed.
temporal_deltas.T-2: Lighting conditions shifted, making the scene darker; no physical plant changes.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: The seedling in P2/P4 shows a slight change in orientation/posture, suggesting a phototropic response or wilting.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of stasis or slow decline. The lack of new growth in P1 and the singular, fragile state of the P2/P4 seedling suggest nutrient deficiency or insufficient light intensity for active development.
anomalies: Electronic component (header pin) in early images (New Introduction/Intervention - removed)
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical environment is currently minimalist. P1 is effectively a dormant vessel. P2/P4 is the only site of active, albeit struggling, biological life. The white rabbit in P3 serves as a static anchor. The overall health is precarious, characterized by a lack of vigorous growth and a reliance on artificial amendments like eggshells to potentially boost soil quality.
